title: benjaminia minor
intro: Benjaminia minor, also known as Benjamin's joy or Minor Benjaminia, is a perennial plant species in the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Benjaminia minor include its potential to relieve digestive issues and reduce fever, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Benjaminia minor can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
